title: 2026 U.S. Senate election in Oklahoma
description: Voters in Oklahoma will elect one member to the U.S. Senate in the general election on November 3, 2026. The primary is June 16, 2026, with a runoff on August 25, 2026, and the filing deadline was April 3, 2026. The race is for the Class II seat previously held by Markwayne Mullin (R), and it will help determine the partisan balance of the U.S. Senate.
polling_note: No public polling found for this race as of 2026-04-01.

candidates.name: N'Kiyla Thomas
candidates.summary: N'Kiyla Thomas is the Democratic candidate for Oklahoma's 2026 U.S. Senate race. Ballotpedia describes her as a declared candidate for the Democratic primary, and her campaign has publicly framed her bid around being a nurse, mother, and grassroots candidate focused on Oklahoma's future.

career_history.title: U.S. Senate candidate
career_history.description: Running for the Oklahoma U.S. Senate seat in 2026.

candidates.name: Kevin Hern
candidates.summary: Kevin Hern is the Republican candidate for Oklahoma's 2026 U.S. Senate race and currently represents Oklahoma's 1st Congressional District in the U.S. House. He announced his Senate bid in March 2026 and has been backed by President Donald Trump and other Republican leaders, making him the early frontrunner in the GOP primary.

summary_sources.title: Oklahoma Voice: Hern launches Senate bid

career_history.title: U.S. Representative
career_history.organization: U.S. House of Representatives, Oklahoma's 1st Congressional District

career_history.title: Business owner
career_history.description: Public materials describe him as a businessman before entering Congress.
